constraints: Preserve the approved production visual baseline
Exclude SIN, banking, medical and payroll data
Never send, approve, purchase, merge or deploy without the applicable safety gate

tasks.title: Build field operations foundation
tasks.summary: Connect vehicles, employee records, tickets, time, field forms, photos, signatures, alerts and all three field portals.

tasks.title: Connect job workbook and production tracking
tasks.summary: Expose project materials, estimate quantities, installed-to-date quantities and remaining production inside the Foreman Portal.
acceptance_criteria: Estimated and installed quantities are compared
Entries link to cost codes and project

tasks.title: Complete subcontractor and rental workflow
tasks.summary: Add vendor-filtered subcontractor and rental equipment entries with hours, rates, quantities, tickets and cost-code matching.

tasks.title: Complete selectable safety form engine
tasks.summary: Build reusable task-hazard-control templates, crew attendance, individual authenticated signatures and corrective-action tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Selectable tasks populate hazards and controls

tasks.title: Complete inspections and service alerts
tasks.summary: Add equipment-specific inspection checklists, hours, next service calculations, severity routing and Jeremie/Mac notification delivery.
acceptance_criteria: Service due dates and hours update

tasks.title: Complete employee compliance records
tasks.summary: Add management entry/edit screens for contacts, emergency contacts, positions, course tickets, attachments and expiry notifications.
acceptance_criteria: Sensitive excluded data is not collected

tasks.title: Complete time-off and performance workflows
tasks.summary: Add employee requests, manager decisions, status history, private review scheduling and acknowledgement.
acceptance_criteria: Managers approve or decline with audit history

tasks.title: Build field reporting and exports
tasks.summary: Create daily report, weekly labour, fuel, maintenance, production, safety and expense summaries with spreadsheet/PDF export.
acceptance_criteria: Reports filter by job and date
Exports preserve photos and signatures by reference

tasks.title: Harden field role permissions
tasks.summary: Provision Foreman, Operator and Employee access with own-record boundaries, manager oversight and portal-specific navigation.

tasks.title: Add mobile offline field capture
tasks.summary: Queue time, inspections, safety forms and photos during poor connectivity, then synchronize safely with conflict handling.

tasks.title: Validate field operations in production
tasks.summary: Run migration, backup, permission, mobile, upload, alert and rollback checks before the controlled production release.
